document: Guidelines on Information and Cyber Security (India - Row 8)

sections.heading: Reference is drawn to Point no. 3 on "Applicability" of Guidelines on Information and
sections.title: Applicability of Guidelines to Insurers
sections.summary: This section states that the Guidelines on Information and Cyber Security for Insurers are applicable to all insurers regulated by the Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India (IRDAI). The applicability is explicitly defined by reference to Point 3 of the guidelines document.

requirements.text: Guidelines on Information and Cyber Security for Insurers are applicable to all insurers regulated by IRDAI

sections.source_quote: Reference is drawn to Point no. 3 on "Applicability" of Guidelines on Information and Cyber Security for Insurers dated 07.04.2017 read as "this guidelines document is applicable to all insurers regulated by Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India (IRDAI".
sections.relevance_reason: Applicability to insurers defined by regulator

sections.heading: It has been decided by the Authority to extend the applicability of said guidelines to all
sections.title: Extension of Applicability to Insurance Intermediaries
sections.summary: This section declares that the Guidelines on Information and Cyber Security for Insurers apply to all Insurance Intermediaries with immediate effect. The applicability extension is a direct decision by the Authority to include intermediaries within the regulatory scope.

requirements.text: Guidelines on Information and Cyber Security for Insurers apply to all Insurance Intermediaries with immediate effect

sections.source_quote: It has been decided by the Authority to extend the applicability of said guidelines to all Insurance Intermediaries with immediate effect.
sections.relevance_reason: Applies to data protection cross-border transfers
